title: glechoma cadmea
intro: Glechoma cadmea, also known as Creeping Germander, is a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Glechoma cadmea include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Glechoma cadmea can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat colds, sore throats, and digestive issues.
